violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The door to the establishment toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
Splashguards are needed at the 3-bay sink/mop sink area to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
Leak observed under the 3-bay sink. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
The door to the employee restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

The flooring in some areas are constructed of wood (due to prior leak) and the mop sink is placed on small wood beams. Wood is not smooth, durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors etc. must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
